title: Disney Mickey Mouse Kids 40pc Art Supplies Coloring Marker Crayon Paint Pad Set
description:
This immersive creative Disney Mickey House and Friends art kit features all their favorite characters from the Disney Junior series! The portable art kit contains 40 items to keep your little Mickey Mouse and budding artist busy! The art kit includes an exciting coloring book, six colorful markers, twelve vibrant watercolors with a paintbrush and mixing tray, six colorful markers, ten crayons, six high-quality colored pencils, a pencil sharpener, and an eraser that all securely fit in the art supplies tote provided. With multiple mediums to choose from, your child will never get bored while on the go with this super fun art kit!

Disney Mickey Mouse Kids 40pc Art Supplies Coloring Marker Crayon Paint Pad Set

This immersive creative Disney Mickey House and Friends art kit features all their favorite characters from the Disney Junior series! The portable art kit contains 40 items to keep your little Mickey Mouse and budding artist busy! The art kit includes an exciting coloring book, six colorful markers, twelve vibrant watercolors with a paintbrush and mixing tray, six colorful markers, ten crayons, six high-quality colored pencils, a pencil sharpener, and an eraser that all securely fit in the art supplies tote provided. With multiple mediums to choose from, your child will never get bored while on the go with this super fun art kit!

Key Features

  • MICKEY MOUSE CLUBHOUSE ART KIT: Join Mickey Mouse and his pals with this super fun Mickey Mouse Clubhouse art kit! The Disney Mickey Mouse and Friends art kit comes with a coloring book, 10 crayons, 6 markers, 6 colored pencils, a pencil sharpener, an eraser, 12 watercolor paints, a mixing tray, and a paintbrush!
  • FUN ART SUPPLIES: With Mickey Mouse and Friends art kit your budding artist will have everything they need to unleash their creativity through art! With so many different types of art supplies provided, little Mickey Mouse fans will get to explore different types of art mediums like painting, drawing, and coloring
  • TODDLER TRAVEL TOYS: Be ready whenever creativity strikes! This Mickey Mouse and Friends art kit can be taken wherever your little Mickey Mouse fan goes; to school, playdates, airplane travel, and more, the easy to carry tote with a built-in handle keeps all the art supplies safe and secure when on the go
  • FINE MOTOR TOYS: Not only a great creative outlet for art, but the Mickey Mouse Clubhouse art kit also allows little ones to develop their fine motor skills through drawing, painting, and coloring! Mixing paint, trying to color between the lines, and perfecting their artwork helps with the development of their dexterity, hand-eye coordination, and imagination
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 11.7” x 1.5” x 12.5”inches; Weight: .86lbs; Color: Blue; Ages: 3+

Product Specifications

  • MPN: UPDOLKCATS
  • UPC: 805219524893
  • Color: Multicolor

Be ready for any Mickey Mouse artistic adventure! This ideal Disney Mickey Mouse and Friends Art supplies kit can be used at preschool, elementary school, day camps, or for any imaginative adventures with Mickey and his friends at the Mickey Mouse Clubhouse. Your child will easily keep their art supplies secure with this carrying case craft supplies tote with a handle.

With a multitude of different exciting art mediums found in this colorful craft supplies tote, your little one can unleash their creativity and be able to showcase their own Disney artwork. An ideal birthday present or holiday gift, this Mickey Mouse and Friends art activity set will provide hours of entertainment by creating artwork from Mickey Mouse and all his friends!
